headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Bets $10 Billion on Crinetics to Build Endocrinology Powerhouse
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) said it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $85 per share in cash, a transaction Vertex executives described as a strategic expansion into specialty endocrinology.
